benefits.description: Lost 41.6 lbs in 3 months; slowed digestion making user feel fuller longer and maintaining more intense caloric deficit
Reduced appetite; user could only eat so much which encouraged better eating habits
Improved overall body appearance and self-image; visible changes in face and body

side_effects.description: First two injections at each dose increase made user feel tired
First two injections at each dose increase caused nausea if user ate too much the next day

protocol_notes: Titration schedule: 2.5mg once weekly for 4 weeks, then 5mg once weekly for 4 weeks, then 7.5mg once weekly. Currently tapering off (took 7.5mg week 1 of taper, 5mg week 2 of taper) due to concerns about yoyo effect and potential digestive system disruption. User had previously tried weight loss without tirzepatide without success. User was eating poorly before tirzepatide but improved eating habits while on the drug due to reduced appetite capacity.
